name: ANADOLU E.BIR.M. ADR 1/5
summary: Anadolu Efes Biracilik ve Malt Sanayii A.S. (Anadolu Efes) is a Turkish beverage company primarily engaged in the production and distribution of beer and soft drinks. It operates across Turkey, Russia, CIS countries, Europe, and the Middle East. Anadolu Efes is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.
